facts.claim: Norwegian Star is a Dawn-class cruise ship operated by Norwegian Cruise Line (NCL).
Ordered by and intended for Star Cruises, it was originally named SuperStar Libra before being transferred to NCL.
Norwegian Star is a Panamax cruise ship; its 294-meter-length (965 ft) and 32.2-meter-beam (105.6 ft) nears the limit for ships transiting the Panama Canal through the original set of locks.
Norwegian Dawn is in the same class.
